title: carex alpina subsp. inferalpina
intro: Carex alpina subsp. inferalpina, also known as Infernal Alpine Sedge, is a subspecies of Carex alpina, a type of sedge plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Carex alpina subsp. inferalpina include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and even exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of this plant have been used in traditional medicine to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
